summary: Retest of 3 fixes from iteration_85: (1) Kiosk booking Stripe integration, (2) Apple domain-association file, (3) Checkout.js wallet handler auth_token/endpoint fix. All 3 fixes VERIFIED. No regressions.

minor.issue: Response uses 'paymentUrl' + 'booking.stripeSessionId' (pre-existing schema) rather than top-level 'stripeSessionUrl'+'stripeSessionId' mentioned in the review request. Non-breaking; frontend already consumes paymentUrl. Field 'booking.stripe_session_id' (snake_case) is null while 'booking.stripeSessionId' holds value — mild inconsistency.

verification_results.kiosk_book_endpoint: HTTP 200. reference=ZK-USH9B, paymentUrl=https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_live_a1QZFW0imJb5lJnOLkIHOKik8EyVAvuHb0fKX7CYfYdzoMpjucVJdCMvZe... No 'parameter_unknown' error. Stripe Checkout session created successfully with Dashboard-configured payment methods.
verification_results.checkout_js_code_inspection: Line 943: localStorage.getItem('auth_token') ✅. Line 947: POST to /api/proxy/booking/setup-intent ✅. Matches card flow at line 559/562.
verification_results.checkout_page_load: GET /checkout loads cleanly (HTTP 200, title 'Complete Your Booking - Zont'). Shows 'No booking data found' fallback since no booking in session (expected). No React runtime errors, no pageerrors from app code. Only third-party CookieYes 403 warnings (unrelated).
verification_results.kiosk_regression: Response schema preserved: {reference, paymentUrl, qrCode, booking{...}}. No breaking changes.

critical_code_review_comments: Optional cleanup: field 'booking.stripe_session_id' (snake_case) is null while 'booking.stripeSessionId' has value — remove one to avoid confusion.
seed_data_creation: None. Created one live Stripe test booking (ref ZK-USH9B) with awaiting_payment status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration_85 bugs verified fixed. UI-level Apple/Google Pay wallet button testing is not possible in chromium (button hides when wallet unavailable — expected).
